pos_examples: Now, execute deployment in deployment environment teddy using promotion channel object_50 with pre migration check tool object_260 and dependent service rain.
Once you are done, please stage schema version dress_red for channel endpoint secondary roof_11 using channel endpoint primary screen.
First, assign pre migration check tool object_260 to promotion channel object_50 for pre-migration check and then finalize promotion channel object_50 with monitoring.
The next step is to execute deployment with backup in deployment environment teddy using promotion channel object_50 with post migration check tool fire and backup snapshot kumquat.
